params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of product IDs to filter by.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of all products synced to the Brevo platform. Returns product details including name, price, URL, and category assignments.
Creates a new product or updates an existing product in the Brevo eCommerce catalog. If a product with the same ID already exists, it will be updated with the provided data.

info.name: Create or update products in batch

items.docs: Creates or updates up to 100 products in a single API call. Products with existing IDs will be updated, and new products will be created.
Retrieves the details of a specific product by its unique identifier.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: ids
params.description: Comma-separated list of category IDs to filter by.

items.docs: Retrieves all product categories in the eCommerce catalog.
Creates a new product category or updates an existing one. If a category with the same ID exists, it will be updated.

info.name: Create or update categories in batch

items.docs: Creates or updates multiple product categories in a single API call.
Creates a new order or updates the status of an existing order in the Brevo eCommerce system. Orders are used for revenue attribution and purchase behavior tracking.

info.name: Create or update orders in batch

items.docs: Creates or updates multiple orders in a single API call for efficient bulk processing of order data.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Start date for filtering orders in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: End date for filtering orders in YYYY-MM-DD format.

items.docs: Retrieves order details from the Brevo eCommerce system. Supports filtering by date range and pagination.
